name: Seerr Loading Screen
description: Show Sonarr/Radarr pending downloads as Jellyfin library items with live progress.
overview: Surfaces Jellyseerr-requested media via Sonarr/Radarr queue as a browseable Jellyfin channel with progress overlays. Backed by a small Python side-car daemon (jslsd) that polls the Arr APIs.

versions.changelog: Fix: register IChannel in DI container so Jellyfin actually discovers and lists the channel. Verified end-to-end on a live Jellyfin 10.11.8 server. Adds --demo flag to the daemon for first-run preview.

v0.2.0: implemented IChannel for browseable virtual library. Pending Sonarr/Radarr downloads now appear as a Jellyfin channel with progress posters. Native iOS/Android/tvOS support via baked PNG overlays.
